items.title_en: Unique SpaceX IPO is hedging challenge for Wall Street: 'What are you going to do, short NASA?'
items.title_zh: 独特的 SpaceX 首次公开募股正在对冲华尔街面临的挑战：“做空 NASA，你打算做什么？”
items.desc_en: Millbank Dartmoor Portsmouth CIO Dennis Davitt says he hasn't seen anything like the SpaceX IPO since 2004. Investors are nervous about their positions.
items.desc_zh: Millbank Dartmoor Portsmouth 首席信息官丹尼斯·戴维特 (Dennis Davitt) 表示，自 2004 年以来，他还没有见过像 SpaceX IPO 这样的事情。投资者对自己的立场感到紧张。

items.title_en: Google and Meta denied new trial in youth social media addiction case
items.title_zh: 谷歌和 Meta 否认对青少年社交媒体成瘾案进行新审判
items.desc_en: The companies had sought a new trial in a lawsuit filed by a woman who said she became addicted to YouTube and Instagram at a young age because of their design.
items.desc_zh: 两家公司在一名女性提起的诉讼中寻求重新审判，这名女性表示，她年轻时就因为 YouTube 和 Instagram 的设计而沉迷其中。

items.title_en: Whale graveyard dating back five million years discovered
items.title_zh: 发现距今五百万年的鲸鱼墓地
items.desc_en: The Indian Ocean site is "far beyond anything we had imagined", one researcher says.
items.desc_zh: 一位研究人员表示，印度洋遗址“远远超出了我们的想象”。

items.title_en: As gold's tumble continues, traders bet the pain may last for two more years
items.title_zh: 随着金价持续下跌，交易员押注这种痛苦可能还会持续两年
items.desc_en: Selling in the precious metal just keeps getting worse, with the GLD ETF now down 25% from its intraday record in February.
items.desc_zh: 贵金属的抛售情况持续恶化，GLD ETF 目前较 2 月份的盘中记录下跌了 25%。

items.title_en: Wall Street needs a crash course in the token economy ahead of AI IPOs. SpaceX offers a preview
items.title_zh: 在人工智能 IPO 之前，华尔街需要上一堂代币经济速成课。 SpaceX 提供预览
items.desc_en: When OpenAI and Anthropic make their IPO prospectuses available to the public, investors are going to have to learn about a whole new economy.
items.desc_zh: 当 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 向公众公开其 IPO 招股说明书时，投资者将不得不了解一个全新的经济体。

items.title_en: An unusual derivative play off SpaceX’s IPO success: A maker of space gases
items.title_zh: SpaceX 首次公开募股成功的不寻常衍生品：一家太空气体制造商
items.desc_en: Rothschild & Co. Redburn sees industrial gas supplier Linde emerging as a potential beneficiary alongside SpaceX.
items.desc_zh: Rothschild & Co. Redburn 认为工业气体供应商 Linde 与 SpaceX 一样成为潜在受益者。

items.title_en: Three Indian sailors missing after US says it hit tanker in Gulf of Oman
items.title_zh: 美国称在阿曼湾击中油轮后三名印度水手失踪
items.desc_en: India's government said three Indian sailors were missing and 21 crew had been rescued after the hit on the Settebello off the coast of Oman.
items.desc_zh: 印度政府表示，阿曼海岸附近的塞特贝洛号遭遇袭击，造成 3 名印度水手失踪，21 名船员获救。

items.title_en: A rebound with staying power may be in the cards for this beat-up medical devices ETF
items.title_zh: 这个遭受重创的医疗器械 ETF 可能会出现持久力反弹
items.desc_en: This latest bounce for the iShares U.S. Medical Devices ETF (IHI) is no ordinary rally, according to the charts.
items.desc_zh: 从图表来看，iShares 美国医疗器械 ETF (IHI) 的最新反弹并不是普通的反弹。

items.title_en: Commercial real estate saw record lending competition in April, according to JLL
items.title_zh: 仲量联行表示，四月份商业房地产的贷款竞争创历史新高
items.desc_en: Global credit activity among lenders as well as overall competitiveness of loan terms reached an all-time high in April, JLL found.
items.desc_zh: 仲量联行发现，四月份贷款机构的全球信贷活动以及贷款条款的整体竞争力达到历史最高水平。

items.desc_zh: 世界杯带来的预期旅游热潮看起来将是对每个城市、每场比赛定价能力的考验。

items.desc_zh: 这项裁决推翻了下级法院周一下令释放王储妃 29 岁儿子的决定。
